title: AI Security News & Reference
description: Essential feeds, databases, and communities for staying current on AI security incidents, vulnerabilities, and policy developments.

items.title: AI Security Weekly
items.description: Curated weekly digest of AI security incidents, research, and tool releases.

items.title: The AI Security Digest
items.description: News and analysis for practitioners following AI security developments.

items.title: Risky Business
items.description: Leading information security podcast; regularly covers AI risk topics.

items.title: tl;dr sec Newsletter
items.description: Curated AppSec and security engineering links, including AI security coverage.

items.title: Last Week in AI
items.description: Weekly roundup of AI research papers, product launches, and industry news.

items.title: AI Incidents Database (AIID)
items.description: Crowdsourced database of AI system failures, harms, and near-misses.

items.title: MITRE ATLAS
items.description: Adversarial threat landscape for AI systems — tactics, techniques, procedures.

items.title: OWASP LLM Top 10
items.description: Top 10 security risks for LLM applications, maintained by OWASP.

items.title: NVD (NIST National Vulnerability Database)
items.description: Authoritative source for CVE data including ML library vulnerabilities.

items.title: Jailbreak Database
items.description: Documented LLM jailbreak techniques and bypass methods.

items.title: The Register — AI coverage
items.description: Tech journalism with strong AI security and criticism coverage.

items.title: Wired — AI section
items.description: Long-form coverage of AI policy, safety, and societal impact.

items.title: IEEE Spectrum — AI & Robotics
items.description: Technical news with strong engineering credibility.

items.title: VentureBeat AI
items.description: Enterprise AI news, product launches, and research coverage.

items.title: MIT Technology Review
items.description: Deep analysis of AI developments, policy, and societal implications.

items.title: AP Stylebook — AI and Tech Guide
items.description: Industry-standard style guide for AI and technology reporting.

items.title: Reuters Handbook of Journalism
items.description: Reuters editorial standards and values for factual, accurate reporting.

items.title: SPJ Code of Ethics
items.description: Society of Professional Journalists ethical standards, relevant to AI coverage.

items.title: AI Safety Forum
items.description: Technical AI safety and alignment discussions.

items.title: r/AIRisk
items.description: Discussion of existential and near-term AI risk.

items.title: MLSecOps Community
items.description: Community for security engineers working with ML systems.

items.title: NIST AI Public Working Group
items.description: NIST AI programs, including AI RMF participation and comment periods.

items.title: Poynter NewsU — Data Journalism
items.description: Journalism training including coverage of tech and AI topics.

items.title: Knight Center for Journalism — AI Courses
items.description: Free and low-cost online courses covering AI in journalism.

items.title: Investigative Reporters and Editors (IRE)
items.description: Resources for data-driven and investigative journalism including AI coverage.
